scope: Phase-1 recipe-discrimination pilot for the libero_10 low-ceiling + oscillation problem (see AGENT/libero10_investigation_2026-06-12.md). Two arms, started fresh from the official LIBERO checkpoint, vary ONLY the training data mixture. This file documents the runs; it is not an execution request.

common.note: lr / batch / scheduler are IDENTICAL to the 30K baseline run phase1_scene_only_formal_6gpu_b30_from_libero_ckpt. Only the data mixture (per arm), max_iter, and save_iter differ.

current_recipe_reference.mixture: demo 0.50 / success_rollout 0.25 / failure_rollout 0.25 (failures upsampled 4.4x from 62506 to 275313 steps to hit the 0.5 success-rollout balance)

runs.hypothesis_variable: removes failure data AND raises action-supervision density (demo share 0.5->1.0) simultaneously
runs.loss_confirmation: loss dict shows only demo_sample_* terms (no world_model_sample_* / value_function_sample_*) -> zero rollout samples confirmed at runtime
runs.value_head: trained on demo value frames only (success returns); harmless for control (value never used in benchmark), mildly weakens value as an E5/SCVC-invariant block

runs.status: PENDING manual launch after Arm A completes (shares all 6 GPUs)
runs.hypothesis_variable: removes failure data ONLY (keeps 50/25/25 structure and value learning) -> clean attribution vs Arm A
runs.value_head: preserved (success rollouts feed WM/value heads) -> keeps E5 planning alive

eval.judgement_rule: compare arms by MULTI-POINT mean±std only; never single checkpoints (50-trial endpoints were already burned by sampling oscillation troughs). Recipe decision is researcher-only.

decision_logic.leakage_confirmed_if: Arm A and Arm B mean±std both clearly above current-recipe overlap mean -> drop failures project-wide (incl. SCVC pair dataset success_rollout_sampling_prob)
decision_logic.density_matters_if: Arm A > Arm B -> demo-only (action-supervision density) helps beyond removing failures
decision_logic.budget_or_ood_if: A ≈ B ≈ current -> ceiling is sample-budget / BC-OOD, not leakage -> keep official recipe, invest in variance governance (see VARIANCE_GOVERNANCE_SWITCHES.md) + more steps
decision_logic.variance_value: a recipe that halves the std is valuable even at equal mean (oscillation is half the pain)
